title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
IDBI Bank is proud to be associated with the naval branch of the Armed forces of India 'Indian Navy'. Our Bank wishes to offer the best of services to those who offers nation protection and also plays crucial role in providing humanitarian relief. 
  * Usage of IDBI Bank ATM network free of cost also usage of any other bank's ATM for domestic as well as international transactions free of cost - subject to RBI regulations as applicable from time to time
  * We provides concession in Demand drafts and pay orders
  * Salary savings account with Flexi Fixed Deposit facility allowing a sweep out to fixed deposit from salary account


  * We have specialized representatives for our preferred customers to execute your banking needs more easily
  * Internet banking, Phone banking, Mobile banking, Mobile payment service and Account alerts. Free Bill pay, on-line tax payments, funds transfer on your savings account and much more through Internet Banking
  * Card-to-Card Transfer facility using the Visa Money Transfer Service are available within this account


Some of the benefits that you are entitled to as an employee.
  * Access to any branch free of cost for Cheque deposit, account to account money transfer, cash withdrawal and cash deposit


Get a Indian Navy Salary Account in 3 easy steps.
Call on our Phone Banking numbers Toll Free - (24x7 service)

metadata.description: IDBI bank feels honored by offering a Salary Accounts for our defense personnel and to meet their financial requirements with baking convenience.
